seo.defaultDescription: Accessible AAC app with speech synthesis, installable PWA, and offline support for speech rehabilitation.
seo.keywords: stroke speech, AAC, assisted communication, speech rehabilitation, post stroke, text to speech, PWA, accessibility

index.seoDescription: AAC word cards for fast assisted communication with speech synthesis.

phrases.seoDescription: Customizable AAC phrases to support daily assisted communication.

defaults.family: I want to talk to my family

settings.seoDescription: General Stroke Speech configuration: visual theme and usage preferences.
settings.title: General settings
settings.intro: This section groups the general app settings. You can use the theme button in the header and centralize future preferences here.
settings.testVoiceHint: Tap the card to hear the voice with the current language, pitch, and speed.

about.seoDescription: Accessible AAC app for assisted communication, with PWA support, offline mode, and speech synthesis for speech rehabilitation.
about.title: About this project
about.subtitle: Stroke Speech - AAC (Augmentative and Alternative Communication)
about.p1: Stroke Speech is an accessible web app to support communication for people with speech difficulties, especially in post-stroke recovery contexts. It allows selecting word and phrase cards to express daily needs using speech synthesis.
about.p2: It also works as a Progressive Web App (PWA), so it can be installed on mobile and desktop, work offline, and stay automatically updated after each deployment.
about.goalsText: Immediate communication, maximum accessibility, and full availability with an installable experience and offline support.
about.featuresText: Customizable cards, speech synthesis, colors and emojis per card, safe delete mode, and auto-updating PWA.
about.techText: Nuxt 4, Vue 3, Nuxt UI, Tailwind CSS 4, @vite-pwa/nuxt (Workbox), VueUse, TypeScript, ESLint, and Vitest.

addCard.wordHint: Word mode enabled: this field accepts only one word, with no spaces. Accents are allowed (example: canción, árbol).

errors.singleWord: Only one word is allowed (letters including accents, no spaces or symbols).
